title: Remove unused util.StartsWithValidTransport
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

> /kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Remove unused `util.StartsWithValidTransport`

It is not used, and it should check the current list of transports from c/image/transports instead of hard-coding (like `cmd/buildah/push.go` currently does).

#### How to verify it

Just see that everything still builds.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #3313

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Is this an API break that shouldn’t happen?

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
